milestones.name: Rule engineering and professional review
milestones.summary: 0/6 tasks accepted. M4-T001..T006 all MERGED to main as DRAFT engineering (needs_review rules); gates PASS recorded/on-file. NONE accepted, Published, or Verified. Whole chain blocked from acceptance by G6 qualified-human legal approval on M4-T001 (+ B-010 client benchmark). PLANNED (proposed in the M4-footprint control-only PR, NOT yet contracted): four legal_rule footprint tasks M4-T007 (lot coverage), M4-T008 (rear yards + rear-yard equivalents), M4-T009 (front yards), M4-T010 (side yards), gates G0-G6, sequenced one frozen-SHA task at a time. On approval + contracting they raise M4 contracted scope from 6 to 10 tasks (still 0 accepted; no acceptance without G6). See project-control/reports/M4-footprint-control-metadata-reconciliation.md for the planned-count/dashboard impact.

milestones.name: Scenario and optimization engine
milestones.summary: 1 task contracted, 0 accepted (no longer 'not started'). M5-T001 (deterministic coverage-aware scenario foundation) MERGED to main as DRAFT (needs_review); G0/G1/G3/G4/G5 PASS on file; awaiting_gate, NOT accepted. Surfaces the canonical FAR cap only; every envelope constraint (height/setback/yard/lot-coverage/parking) is emitted 'missing' and top-level data_completeness is deterministically missing_critical (a floor-area cap is never a buildable envelope). Final acceptance gated on the M4 chain clearing G6.
